---
title: "He Ren, PhD, CFA"
pagetitle: "About Me"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/imrenhe
      aria-label: GitHub
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/imrenhe/
      aria-label: LinkedIn
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=POuWIfYAAAAJ&hl=en
      aria-label: Google Scholar
---

## Hi, I'm happy you're here

I'm an Assistant Professor of Finance at [Merrilee Alexander Kick College of Business and Entrepreneurship, Texas Woman's University](https://twu.edu/business/). My research interest focuses on investments, household finance, and the impact of AI and Fintech on financial decision-making and markets.

## Outside the classroom

Outside the classroom and my research, I'm also a Rubik's cube solver. You can check out my <a href="https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/persons/2025RENH02" target="_blank" rel="noopener">World Cube Association (WCA) profile</a> to see my official results. I'm also passionate about photography. You can browse some of my favorite shots in the Photography section of this website.

## What you'll find here

- [**Teaching**](teaching.qmd) — courses I currently teach and have taught.
- <a href="https://imrenhe.github.io/fin3053-business-finance-book/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><strong>Business Finance Book</strong></a> — book used for Business Finance class, work in progress.
- [**Research**](research.qmd) — publications and working papers.
- [**Blog**](blog/index.qmd) — occasional writing.
- [**Photography**](photography.qmd) — a gallery of photos.

## Education

- **Ph.D. in Finance**, University of North Texas, 2019
- **M.B.A.**, University of Texas at Dallas, 2014
- **M.S. in Finance**, State University of New York at Buffalo, 2011
- **B.S. in Economics**, Shanghai University of International Business and Economics, 2010

## Professional Certifications

- CFA Institute Sustainable Investing Certificate, 2023
- Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®), 2022
- Financial Risk Manager (FRM®), 2022
